description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push to main and tags starting with v*, as well as on pull requests. Use a matrix job strategy to test on multiple Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9) across macOS, Ubuntu, and Windows environments. For each job, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, upgrade pip, install dependencies with make setup, install the package, run tests with make test, lint with make lint, and upload coverage to Codecov using a CODECOV_TOKEN from secrets.
